requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety and Installation Approval

summary.en: Kazakhstan BESS installations may require fire-safety review under local building, industrial-safety, emergency, and project-owner requirements. Review commonly focuses on container spacing, access, fire detection and alarm, suppression or mitigation design, ventilation, gas detection where relevant, emergency shutdown, thermal-runaway propagation controls, signage, and emergency response documentation.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦BESS安装可能须按当地建筑、工业安全、应急管理及项目业主要求接受消防安全审查。审查通常关注集装箱间距、通道、火灾探测和报警、灭火或缓解设计、通风、适用时的气体探测、紧急停机、热失控蔓延控制、标识和应急响应文件。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦BESS安裝可能須按當地建築、工業安全、應急管理及項目業主要求接受消防安全審查。審查通常關注集裝箱間距、通道、火災探測和報警、滅火或緩解設計、通風、適用時的氣體探測、緊急停機、熱失控蔓延控制、標識和應急響應文件。

standards_or_laws: Kazakhstan fire-safety and emergency-authority requirements for installations
Project-specific fire-protection design and local permitting requirements
Applicable ST RK / GOST / IEC fire and electrical installation standards specified by the project

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project-specific fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These documents may support technical due diligence but do not replace Kazakhstan fire-authority, insurer, local permitting, or project-owner expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目消防审查管理固定式储能安全。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代哈萨克斯坦消防主管机关、保险方、当地许可或项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目消防審查管理固定式儲能安全。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代哈薩克斯坦消防主管機關、保險方、當地許可或項目業主要求。

gap.en: A battery or EAC certificate does not close the Kazakhstan installation fire-safety gap. Exporters should prepare site layouts, fire-protection drawings, thermal-runaway mitigation evidence, fire and gas detection logic where relevant, ventilation calculations, emergency shutdown logic, remote monitoring records, fire-load assumptions, maintenance plans, and Russian or local-language emergency procedures for the project owner and authorities.
gap.zh: 电池证书或EAC证书不能覆盖哈萨克斯坦安装消防安全差距。出口商应准备场地布置图、消防设计图、热失控缓解证据、适用时的火灾和气体探测逻辑、通风计算、紧急停机逻辑、远程监控记录、火荷载假设、维护计划和俄文或当地语言应急程序，供项目业主和主管机关审查。
gap.zht: 電池證書或EAC證書不能覆蓋哈薩克斯坦安裝消防安全差距。出口商應準備場地佈置圖、消防設計圖、熱失控緩解證據、適用時的火災和氣體探測邏輯、通風計算、緊急停機邏輯、遠端監控記錄、火荷載假設、維護計劃和俄文或當地語言應急程序，供項目業主和主管機關審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Kazakhstan installation, building, emergency, industrial-safety, insurer, or project-owner fire review applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

source.publisher: Ministry of Emergency Situations of the Republic of Kazakhstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EAC or Chinese GB battery evidence is not enough for Kazakhstan BESS fire approval. Installation fire-safety review and project-specific mitigation evidence should be handled before shipment or site commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAC或中国GB电池证据不足以覆盖哈萨克斯坦BESS消防批准。出货或现场调试前，应处理安装消防安全审查和项目特定缓解证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAC或中國GB電池證據不足以覆蓋哈薩克斯坦BESS消防批准。出貨或現場調試前，應處理安裝消防安全審查和項目特定緩解證據。
